general_feedback: The newly filled-in @tparam Sub, @tparam Semi, and @param maxSize descriptions are accurate, concise, and consistent with the surrounding documentation. `Sub` correctly identifies the public supertype returned by `trySplit` (line 117 confirms `trySplit(): Sub | Null`). `Semi` correctly describes the concrete self-type produced by `semiclone` (line 109), and the subtype-of-Sub relationship matches the bound `Semi <: Sub & ChampStepperBase[A, T, ?, ?]`. `maxSize` is accurately described as the maximum number of remaining elements, which matches the decrement-on-step usage in `nextStep`. All entries start with lowercase, use backticks for code references, and are appropriately brief.
